title: Packed Up (Backpacks)
description: Packed Up allows you to pack up all your things into new amazing Backpacks!
body:
![Packed Up](https://imgur.com/ttAOcq3.png) **Packed Up** allows you to solve your inventory problems, by giving you the ability to craft **new amazing Backpacks**! This will allow you to carry your things with you instead of having all those nasty chests around everywhere! It is also ideal for travelling and exploring dungeons! Backpacks can also be used with **Baubles**, **Curios** and **Trinkets**, and can be opened with a keybind! ![Separator](https://imgur.com/OwFkm6a.png) ### Backpacks: #### Standard Backpack - good for 3 rows of storage.
Recipe
#### Iron Backpack - upgrade from the Standard Backpack - 4 rows of storage
Recipe
#### Copper Backpack - upgrade from the Standard Backpack - 4 rows of storage
Recipe
#### Golden Backpack - upgrade from the Iron Backpack or Copper Backpack - 5 rows of storage
Recipe
#### Silver Backpack - upgrade from the Iron Backpack or Copper Backpack - 5 rows of storage
Recipe
#### Diamond Backpack - upgrade from the Golden Backpack or Silver Backpack - 7 rows of storage
Recipe
#### Obsidian Backpack - upgrade from the Diamond Backpack - 8 rows of storage
Recipe
![Separator](https://imgur.com/OwFkm6a.png) ### Backpack Customization Backpacks can have a custom name and custom icon. To customize a backpack, simply shift-right-click whilst holding it. ![Backpack customization](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZbFzEauY/images/f4f0edb4819a396d8939b5201a0c5365ff2bcda0_350.webp) ![Separator](https://imgur.com/OwFkm6a.png) ### Opening a Backpack from inside a Backpack 1. Open a backpack by right-clicking it 2. Right-click on another backpack in the inventory ![Separator](https://imgur.com/OwFkm6a.png) ### FAQ **Does this mod add copper and silver ingots?** No, in order to craft the copper and silver backpacks you need a mod that adds copper and silver ingots. **Can I change the storage capacity each backpack has?** Yes, this can be changed in the config file **Can I use your mod in my modpack?** Yes, feel free to use my mod in your modpack ![Separator](https://imgur.com/OwFkm6a.png) ### Discord For future content, upcoming mods, and discussion, feel free to join the SuperMartijn642 discord server! [](https://discord.gg/QEbGyUYB2e) ![Separator](https://imgur.com/OwFkm6a.png) ![All the available backpacks](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/281/287/banner.png)
